npm error code E404
npm error 404 Not Found - GET https://registry.npmjs.org/nonexistent-package-xyz
npm error 404
npm error 404  'nonexistent-package-xyz@latest' is not in this registry.
npm error 404
npm error 404 Note that you can also install from a tarball, folder, http url, or git url.
npm error A complete log of this run can be found in: /Users/user/.npm/_logs/debug.log
